rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Rulings: Lori DeMartini's Motion for Summary Judgment and in the alternative Motion for Summary Adjudication denied. The motion fails to shift the burden to Petitioner Adler in that it fails to disprove the essential elements asserted in the 850 petition or to show that the mediation agreement is a bar to Adler's Petition. Furthermore, there are triable issues of fact as to what the signatories to the mediation agreement intended by the language in Paragraph 8 that "the lawsuit in 292513 filed by Thomas DeMartini will be dismissed" and, Thomas DeMartini's petition filed in 292513 was dismissed without prejudice. Further, Adler's petition would not be barred as to other beneficiaries under the trust. As to Lori DeMartini's Request for Judicial notice included in the Declaration of Herman Franck filed May 31, 2011 the court rules as follows: 1. Request for judicial notice of Thomas DeMartini's Petition re Breach of Trust filed 7/2/09 granted. 2. Request for judicial notice of the Order approving Mediation Agreement dated 10/22/09 granted. 3. Request for judicial notice of Adler's Amended Petition for Restitution filed February 10, 2010 granted. 4. Request for judicial notice of Lori DeMartini's First Amended Answer to Petition filed 7/28/10 granted. Lori DeMartini's 8/18/11 Request for Judicial notice of the Declaration of Lori DeMartini in Support of Opposition to Motion for Sanctions is granted. Adler's Motion for Sanctions is denied. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling and argue either motion must notify the Court at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. today.
